name: solana-auditor-skill
description: World-class Solana security auditor for Claude Code — full lifecycle from reconnaissance to remediation. SAST, threat modeling, formal verification, CVSS triage, structured reports, and inline fix guidance. Built for Superteam Brasil.

differentiators.usefulness: Real audit deliverables: CVSS-scored findings, structured PoC exploits, inline fix suggestions, and final audit reports. Actual bug submissions filed with Immunefi (Kamino Finance, Solend Governance, Raydium CLMM).
differentiators.novelty: Only full-lifecycle Solana auditor: Phase 0 consent guard → Phases 1-6 → remediation. No competitor covers SAST + threat modeling + economic security + formal verification + report generation in one coherent pipeline. Only skill with PT-BR bilingual support.
differentiators.quality: 161 integrity checks, 22 property-based fuzz tests, CVSS math mathematically verified, 2-tier execution (SAST-only vs full runtime), 6 compile-verified fixtures, 50 Solana-specific SAST rules.
differentiators.fit: Follows solana-game-skill reference structure exactly. skill/SKILL.md progressive routing, agents/, commands/, rules/, install.sh, CLAUDE.md, README.md — all at root level. MIT licensed, zero external dependencies.
